title: Linux Hidden File or Directory Creation in Suspicious Location
description: Detects creation of hidden files or directories (starting with dot) in world-writable or suspicious locations commonly used by attackers to stash tools and payloads.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*/tmp/.*' or msg like '*/var/tmp/.*' or msg like '*/dev/shm/.*' or msg like '*/run/lock/.*')))
falsepositives: Applications creating hidden temporary configuration files
